author: sleepyhauru
description: Upload a Discord emoji from a 7TV link via [p]7tv <link> [name], or inspect an emote with [p]7tvinfo <link>. Converts WEBP to GIF/PNG when needed.
install_msg: 7TV cog installed. Usage: [p]7tv <link> [name] or [p]7tvinfo <link> (requires Manage Emojis for uploads).
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store any user data.
